headline: 2 Reasons to Like MO and 1 to Stay Skeptical
summary: Altria currently trades at $66.56 per share and has shown little upside over the past six months, posting a middling return of 1.3%.

headline: Paytronix Customer Conference Draws Top Brands in Hospitality to PX|NXT

headline: Is It Time To Reassess Altria Group (MO) After Its Strong Multi Year Share Price Run?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Altria Group's current share price reflects its true value or if the market is missing something that could still be taken advantage of. Altria Group most recently closed at US$66.80, with returns of 2.0% over 7 days, 16.6% year to date and 26.9% over 1 year. The 3 year and 5 year returns sit at 88.4% and 91.9% respectively, which naturally raises questions about what is already priced in. Recent coverage has focused on Altria Group's role in the US tobacco...
